variants: Kaede Sakamoto holds an Obsidian Smithing Certificate, highlighting her skill in blending artistry with functionality in her landscape architecture projects. Affiliated with the Peregrine Astrolabe Society, she brings a fresh perspective to outdoor design. Her work has been notably supported by the Basilisk Inspiration Fund, which enables her to implement innovative ideas and sustainable practices. Under the mentorship of Shanil Karmali, Kaede has refined her expertise in the field, establishing herself as a knowledgeable figure in landscape architecture. Her contributions reflect a commitment to creating beautiful and sustainable environments.
